description.value:
Receive Prescription processing vvv-geaccepteerd building blocks for patient J. de XXX_Wit
For more info: https://informatiestandaarden.nictiz.nl/wiki/mp:V3.0.0_testgegevens_afhandelen_voorschrift_ontvangen
Original description: TEST Scenarioset 23.5b afhandelen voorschrift t.b.v. VVV <span class="xforms-group xforms-group-appearance-full xforms-visited" id="main-ui"><span class="xforms-group xforms-visited" id="xf-103"><span class="fr-accordion-lnf xforms-group xforms-visited" id="main-accordion≡fr-accordion-group"><span class="xforms-group xforms-visited" id="main-accordion≡xf-177⊙21"><span class="xforms-group xforms-group-appearance-full" id="main-ui"><span class="xforms-group" id="xf-103"><span class="fr-accordion-lnf xforms-group" id="main-accordion≡fr-accordion-group"><span class="xforms-group" id="main-accordion≡xf-177⊙16">TEST Scenarioset 23.5b afhandelen voorschrift t.b.v. 100% akkoord VVV met eerdere verstrekking
Receive Prescription processing vvv-geaccepteerd resources in a transaction Bundle
Test server to handle a Bundle of type transaction.
